name: mythosforge-imagegen
description: Generate a 2D image from a text prompt via MythosForge's Replicate-backed engine. Bring your own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN. No wallet, no payment.
output: JSON line on stdout: { ok, model, aspect, prompt, path, bytes }. Read `path` for the written image file.

runtimes.claude-code: SKILL.md (frontmatter name + description; drop folder into skills dir)
runtimes.tool-use-llm: hand tool-schema.json (openai or anthropic block) to the model; host runs the invoke command on the tool call. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Bankr LLM Gateway, Surplus, and any function-calling model.
